title: PSX-MC
description: Minecraft if it was on the ps1
body:
### PSX-MC
Imagine playing Minecraft as if it were a classic PlayStation 1 game! This retro-inspired reimagining brings the blocky, pixelated world of Minecraft to life with nostalgic low-poly graphics and a charming PS1 aesthetic. Dive into a familiar, yet refreshingly vintage experience—perfect for fans of both Minecraft and retro gaming.

Oh, and—wait... is there something lurking in the fog?

(🌟 Pro Tip: If you’re not using a controller, make sure to disable the Motor Assistance Mod for a smoother experience!) 

(🌟 Also turn on all Resorce Packs!)
